titleStmt.title: SII 27.423: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 423. (A.R. No. 562 of 1929-30.) HATYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in prākāra of the Lokanāthēśvara temple.

This record registers a gift god several pieces of land to god Lōkanāthadēva of Hattiyaṅgaḍi by the seṭṭikāras of that place. It states that Baṅkiyarasa alias Hoṁneya-Kaṁbaḷi-voḍeya alias Ammidēvi-amma, Chenneyarasa Toḷaha and the kings of Yikkare (Ikkērī) were ruling Hārunāḍa-sīme as kāṇāchi.

It is dated Śaka 1499, Dhātu, Chaitra śu. 1, the details being insufficient for verification in the absence of the mention of weekday. The tithi corresponds to 1576 A.D., March 1, the Śaka year being current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyayēnamaḥ śrī gurabhyōṁnamaḥ nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraḥcuṁbi caṁdracā
mara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayādbudayā śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1466 neya
dhātu saṁvatsarada cayitra śu 1 dalu śrīmatu baṁkiyarasaru hoṁneya kaṁbaḷi voḍeyarāda Aṁmidēvi Aṁmanavaru sakalaguṇa
saṁpaṁnarāda ceṁneyarasa toḷaharu yikkareya Arasugaḷu hārunāḍa sīmeyanu kāṇuciyāgi Āḷutiruhakāladalli Ava
ra vidyamānadalli haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya halaru seṭṭikāharu haṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara bhaṁḍārakke poḍamaṭṭu barasida śilāśāsana
da vakhaṇiya vivara bīraṇaragadde muḍi 2 . ge dēvasvabhatta muḍi 4 . 2 . beḷakila hāḷi mu 1 . bhta mu 2 . 3 ... jōtāḍiya hirigamu 4 bhta mu 5
A bagega mu 6 bhta mu 7 . duganaga mu 4 bhta mu 3 . Adarriṁda teṁkalu biduraḍi huḷimu 1 bhta mu
1 ... halasina ga mu 1 . bhta mu 2 ... 2 ... kaṭṭinahāḷi mu ... bhta mu 1 . 6 . Ādarakeḷagaṇa teṁkaṇa ga mu 1 . Adaramūḍaṇa hāḷi mu . bhta mu . 5
Adarra teṁkalu māvina ga mu 1 . bhta mu 1 ... 5 Adarra paḍuvaṇa ga 1 . mu 1 bhta mu . 5 paḍuvalu voṇagade na . ḍuvina ga mu 1 . bhta mu ... 1 . nerakaḷi ga
mu 3 bhta mu 1 ... 5 tōḍiṁda mūḍalu mu ... bhta mu . 8 . Adarriṁda mūḍalu mu ... bhta mu 8 ... Adarriṁda mūḍalu mu ... bhta mu . 8 ... Adarriṁda mūḍalu mu ... bhta mu . 8 ...
tōṭa ge . tōḍiṁda paḍuvalu mu 1 . mattaṁ A bage yēkāṁtana guḍemūḍalu mu 1 Ubhayaṁ mu 2 . bhta mu 3 . 2 . kuṭṭagade Uṭṭamakke mu 4 .
bhta mu 5 keḷagaṇa maṭṭa gadde mu 4 bhta mu 2 keḷagaṇa maṭṭa gaddeyiṁda paḍuvalu mu
ḍe 2 bhta mu 1 . kaḍuvina Ayivattu hānegadde paḍuvalu mu 1 . bhta mu ... 7 ... sāliṁda paḍuvalu gamu 0 . bhta mu ... 7 . hayivana gadde kaṁnerā
Utana gadde 2 kke mu 4 . bhta mu 8 . 7 . gōḷigadde mu 1 ... bhta mu 3 . 1 . tāyakkaḷabīḍina bage mayyanabeṭṭu mekkemu 2 . bhta mu 1 . 2 . mayyanakerre
yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mekke mu 1 . bhtamu ... 7 . nirakaḷi paḍuvalu baṁkaneṁbagadde mu 2 bhamu 2 . baṁkaniṁda viḍuU mu ... bhta mu 1 . 6 . baṭṭalagaddeyiṁ
da teṁkalu baṁkanagadde mu 1 . bhta mu 2 . 3 ... dēvālyada teṁkamekke mu 2 bhtamu 1 . dēvālyada baḍaga dēvara bage jōḷagadde 2 kke mu 4 bhta mu 5 A bage yēkāṁtena
guḍḍe paḍuvalu ma 1 . Ā bage Adarra vottina mu . Ā bage Ādarriṁda baḍagamu . Ā bage baḍagalu kuṁcina gade mu 1 . Ā bage baḍagalu kuṁcina nagadde
mu 1 . Ā bage nagarana hāḷi mu 1 . Aṁtu bayalu mu 6 . gebhta mu 11 . Þ . Ā bage haḍilu mu 1 bhta ma . 5 Aṁtū lōkanātha dēvarige kaṭṭida gēṇaṁ
horratāgi taḷada dēvasya mu 11 . gebhtamu 17 . cōṇu meraṭanamalla gadde mūḍa Uḍi mu 5 bhta mu 1 . ne gadde hāḷisaha mu 4 . bhta mu 5 . 5 dē
varagadde mu 6 ... bhta mu 12 . 7 dēvaragadde baḍagalu mu . bhta mu ... 7 . Ādarriṁda paḍuvalu mu 1 . 1 bhta mu 3 . 1 . Ādarriṁda teṁkalu mu 1 ... bhta mu 3 . 1 nā
gi gade mu 1 bhta mu 1 ... 5 pētanahāḷi mu . bhta mu . 6 ... si gadde teṁkalu mu . bhta bhta mu . 5 yēkāṁtana guḍeyiṁda teṁkalu jōḷagadde mu 1 . bhta mu 1 ... 5
Ā bage mēlaṇa jōḷagadde mu 2 bhtamu 3 hā 5 dēvarahāḷiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu make mu 2 bhta mu 1 . Ābagehaḍuvalu mu . bhta mu 18 ... huruḷigadde mu 2 . bhta
mu 4 . 7 . Uyyala hāḷi mu 1 . bhta mu ... 7 . tuppakkaḷa biṭṭiṁda mūḍalu kaṁṭhadagadde mu 14 bhta mū 17 .. kurudōḍiya voḷage hosagadde mu 4 bhta mu 5
hesarinagadde mu 1 . bhta mu 1 ... 5 koḷakegadde mu 4 bhta mu 5 Adarravottina mūḍahāḷibayalu ma . bhtamu . 5 koḷakegadde paḍuvalu mekke mu 1 . bhtamu
ḍi ... 7 . Ā bage Āre . kallahāḷimu . 4 bhta mu . 7 . Aṁtūgaddemu 5 . 6 . bhtamu 7 huttinagadde voḷagedde mu 1 . bhtamu 1 bhta mu 152 . Adake mūḍaṇa kaḷigadde mu 2 . bhta
mu 4 . 7 . baṁkaniṁda paḍuvalu mu ... bhta mu 1 . 6 . palabage yēkāṁtana guḍagedde mu . bhta mu . 6 ... nīrakaḷiyiṁda teṁkalu mu 1 . bhta mu ... 1 . madhurahā
ḷiyiṁda mūḍalu mu ... bhta mu 1 . 6 . gudhana tāriṁda mūḍalu mu . bhtamu . 5 Adarriṁda mūḍalu mu ... bhtamu 1 . 6 . Aṁtugaddemu 8 ke bhta mu 12 . 3 ...
vayidyanaroḷage guḷiyaneṁbagaddemu 2 . Adarriṁda teṁkalu mekkehāḷi 2 kkemu 1 . Adarriṁda teṁkalu nāgarahāḷi 4 kke mu 3 Alliya beṭṭumu 5 Aṁtu
gaddemu 12 guḷiyanagaddeyiṁda nayirutyadallūmane Aḍināgarahāḷiyiṁda paḍuvalu gōḷikere mēlesaha naḍava dēvasvabhta mu 17 . Atūhaṭṭayaṁga
ḍi voḷage gadde mu 151 ... 4 ge dēvasvabhattamūḍi 200 hā 3 dēvarataṭṭinataḷada vivara . kuṁbhārra kereyiṁda paḍuvalu hūvinamakke mu 6 voṇagere bāḷa ca
tussīme vivara . mūḍalu hūvina makkiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu Arasakkeḷa vōṇi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hiribayaliṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
liṁga makkiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī catusīme voḷagaṇa bāḷubayalu makke mekkesaha gadde mu 24 jaṭṭinabāḷa catusīmeya vivara . mūḍalu karike voḷagaṇa kō
ṭināthadēvara dēvasvada gaddeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hiriya hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu balāmanesāliṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Ūra Agaḷi
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme voḷagaṇa bāḷu haḍuvala lekkadalsū gaddemu 7
Digital edition of SII 27.423 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
